description_long: This object is a compact, military-style radio receiver with a rugged, rectangular body finished in a matte brown color. It features a prominent, tall antenna extending from the top, suggesting long-range communication capability. The top panel is equipped with several rotary dials and switches, likely for tuning and volume adjustment, as well as two raised protective rails on either side. The front and back panels are ribbed, possibly for structural reinforcement and heat dissipation. Metal clasps and a carrying handle are visible on the sides, indicating portability and field use. The overall design is robust, with minimal decorative elements, prioritizing functionality and durability.
description: A rugged, brown military-style radio receiver with a tall antenna, rotary dials, and a reinforced, portable body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ribbed panel, two rotary dials, switches, and the tall antenna centered at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carrying handle, metal clasps, and the slim profile of the radio receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a similar ribbed panel as the front, with the antenna and dials partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle, clasps, and the antenna extending upward.
